title: Military Conflict I
description: A pvp-oriented minecraft modpack with firearms and custom maps (in plans).
body:
# Military Conflict I ```In develop``` ```1.20.1``` ```Fabric only``` - Based on [Neon](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neon-modpack) ## About Modpaсk on the theme of the global world conflict, most of the world has been destroyed. You have to survive in this hard world together with other players, join groups and fight for resources. The modpack is also suitable for the competition between players and will soon include different maps. In default, the world is created by continents. ## Open wiki You can edit our modpack wiki! [Do it!](https://codeberg.org/WasteLandOrigin/Military-Conflict-I/wiki) ## Community We are an open community, always ready to help. We have our own discord server with a forum, a github page where you can leave noticed bugs or your suggestions. ## Steam deck and controllers compatibility - Using [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Controlify comes with a huge range of settings to fine-tune each of your controllers individually, including vibration strength, every single controller input bind (no hardcoding!) and more. ## Performance We recommend allocate minimum 5GB of ram for singleplayer game and 3GB for playing on server. And dual core cpu is strongly recommended. ## Community servers Do you want to add your server to the official list of servers? Send us a message on the discord for this! But there are some rules: 1. No donation, which can affect the gameplay. 2. There is no territory private system. 3. Mods and configs on the server are identical to mods and configs on the client. ## Main modpack features *In development* ## Mod loader ```This modpack works only on fabric!``` [Go to the official fabric website](https://fabricmc.net) ## Social

## Other ``` Tip: install our icon to install in the launcher (launcher_logo.png) Tip: use Aikar´s launch options, they will help you to be more efficient :) Tip: use the latest version of fabric Tip: this modpack will be work better if you using Linux. But MacOS/Windows still compatible Also: We prefer the Foss mods. ``` #### Other mods - [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)
